input.sql: merge into t_account fi using t_account_item se on ( fi.certificate_number = se.certificate_number ) when matched then update set fi.amount = se.amount

output.sql: merge into "ENCRYPT_DS".t_account fi using t_account_item se on ( fi.assisted_query_certificate_number = se.assisted_query_certificate_number ) when matched then update set fi.cipher_amount = se.cipher_amount

input.sql: merge into t_account fi using t_account_item se on (fi.certificate_number = se.certificate_number and fi.certificate_number = ?) when matched then update set fi.password = se.password, fi.amount = ? where se.certificate_number = ? delete where fi.certificate_number = ? when not matched then insert (password, amount) values (?, ?) where se.amount = ?

output.sql: merge into "ENCRYPT_DS".t_account fi using t_account_item se on (fi.assisted_query_certificate_number = se.assisted_query_certificate_number and fi.assisted_query_certificate_number = ?) when matched then update set fi.cipher_password = se.cipher_password, fi.assisted_query_password = se.assisted_query_password, fi.like_query_password = se.like_query_password, cipher_amount = ? where se.assisted_query_certificate_number = ? delete where fi.assisted_query_certificate_number = ? when not matched then insert (cipher_password, assisted_query_password, like_query_password, cipher_amount) values (?, ?, ?, ?) where se.cipher_amount = ?
output.parameters: assisted_query_101, encrypt_102, assisted_query_103, assisted_query_104, encrypt_five, assisted_query_five, like_query_five, encrypt_106, encrypt_107
